message:
fix: deduplicate convoy close handling across stores per poll cycle

The same issue close event can appear in multiple stores (hq and rig)
or as multiple event types (EventClosed and EventStatusChanged) within
a single poll cycle. Without deduplication, CheckConvoysForIssue and
feedNextReadyIssue would run multiple times for the same close, causing
duplicate dispatch attempts and noisy logs.

A per-cycle seen set now tracks processed issueIDs, ensuring each close
transition is handled exactly once per poll cycle.

Addresses GHI #1798.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
